notes: It has some strange mouse behavior, but everything runs really well
title: The Coin Game

notes: It has some strange mouse behavior at times, but it's perfectly playable
title: The Coin Game

notes:
The demo appears to run fine. I've played this for ~15-20 minutes without issue. It doesn't run great on my laptop, but I think that has more to do with not having a dedicated GPU than anything. The minimum specs are a GTX960, and the developer specifically says no intel hd GPUs. 

That said, I am running at around 20FPS After changing to potato quality in the settings, which is almost playable depending on the game.
title: The Coin Game
